overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a cozy, rustic cottage interior with wooden beams, bookshelves, and antique furniture. The character walks through the room examining details like a wall clock and staircase before approaching a coat rack by the window.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage living room with reading nook

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the cottage living room toward the back wall with windows

entered.detail: dark wooden bookshelf filled with books reaching to the ceiling
black cast iron wood-burning stove with golden chimney pipe
large ornate ceramic urn with intricate patterns on a wooden shelf
large ornate red and beige patterned rug covering the wooden floor
high-backed wicker armchair with cushion near the back windows
lit table lamp with white shade next to the armchair
large woven wicker basket on the floor near the armchair

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy, rustic cottage living room with wooden floors and exposed beams. The space features a tall bookshelf on the left, a comfortable wicker reading chair in the back corner, and warm lighting from a table lamp as the character walks forward across the patterned rug.

scene_state.functional_zone: back wall with reading nook and wall clock

events.description: character stops walking and tilts camera upward to examine the wall clock and ceiling

agents.ego_description: standing still and looking up at the red wall clock and thatched ceiling beams

entered.detail: red rectangular wall clock with white face mounted high on the wall
sloped ceiling with thatched or woven reed texture between wooden beams
dark wooden support beams running across the sloped ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at the back of the room to look up at a red wall clock and the thatched ceiling with exposed wooden beams. The wicker armchair is now closer in view, and the lower elements like the stove and decorative urn fall out of sight as the camera tilts upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry hall with wooden staircase and coat rack

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the entrance area
character moves from the central living area to the staircase side of the cottage

agents.ego_description: turning back and walking toward the wooden staircase and wall-mounted coat rack near the window

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with simple railings leading to an upper level
wooden stand with hanging cloaks and hats near the far window
rectangular framed mirror mounted on the wall near the staircase
wall-mounted rack holding brooms and long-handled tools

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back through the room, passing the bookshelf again and approaching a steep wooden staircase. The camera reveals a coat rack with hanging garments and a wall mirror near a window, while the back wall elements including the armchair and clock disappear from view behind the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic cottage interior that shifts from a wide exploration of the living area to a focused look at the ceiling before retreating toward the home's exit. It begins as the character walks across a patterned rug toward a wicker reading chair, passing a tall bookshelf under the warm glow of a table lamp. As the character reaches the back of the room, the camera tilts upward to examine a red wall clock and the thatched ceiling's exposed wooden beams, causing the lower furniture to fade from view. The scene then shifts as the character turns and walks back through the space, leaving the armchair and clock behind to approach a steep wooden staircase. Finally, the movement concludes by revealing a wall mirror and a coat rack with hanging garments positioned beside a bright window.
